description:
Implement `hx-code-snippet` (T3 tier) ‚Äî 2/6 libraries ship this. Styled code block with copy button and optional syntax highlighting.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-code-snippet/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-code-snippet.ts`, `hx-code-snippet.styles.ts`, `hx-code-snippet.stories.ts`, `hx-code-snippet.test.ts`

**Props:** `language` (string ‚Äî hints for syntax highlighting), `inline` (boolean ‚Äî renders as `<code>` vs `<pre><code>`), `wrap` (boolean ‚Äî word-wrap in block mode), `copyable` (boolean, default true), `max-lines` (number ‚Äî truncate long snippets with "Show more")

**Slots:** default (code content as text)

**Events:** `hx-copy` (when copy button clicked)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `code`, `copy-button`, `expand-button`

**ARIA:** Block code: `<pre role="region" aria-label="Code snippet">`. Copy button: `aria-label="Copy code"`, shows "Copied!" confirmation for 2 seconds. Inline: `<code>` with no special ARIA.

**Implementation note:** No external syntax highlighting dependency ‚Äî use CSS `color-scheme` and basic monospace styling. The `language` prop is metadata for consumers to integrate their own highlighter via slotted pre-highlighted content.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (copy action, inline vs block, max-lines expand), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with JS/HTML/CSS examples, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-code-snippet ‚Äî T3 Code Display Block
